// note: Compiles Casino Games (web/src/**/*.ts) to web/dist/*.js via tsgo. The pure-TS engine lives in the shared spine package @axiom/web-engine (no wasm); it resolves to that package's built declarations for typecheck, and the emitted JS keeps the bare specifier, resolved by the import map axiom-serve injects (dev) or inlined by a packager. Tests (*.test.ts) are excluded — they run under `node --test` with native TS type-stripping (no DOM), so they need no compile here.
